profiles.label: Interactive coding
profiles.question: Is a person waiting?
profiles.objective: Minimize waiting time inside the current top coding tier.
profiles.router_behavior: Fastest available model in OpenRouter's high Artificial Analysis coding tier, ranked by p50 throughput.
limitations: This optimizes model throughput, not total time to an accepted change.
OpenRouter does not expose a direct latency ceiling for Pareto Code.
The route is sticky while active, but may re-resolve after five idle minutes or a routing error.
If the requested tier is entirely unavailable, OpenRouter may use a neighboring tier.

profiles.label: Delegated coding
profiles.question: Can the work run in the background?
profiles.objective: Minimize inference price inside the current top coding tier.
profiles.router_behavior: Cheapest available model in OpenRouter's high Artificial Analysis coding tier.
limitations: This optimizes model price, not verified cost per successful task.
OpenRouter does not expose a direct task budget for Pareto Code.
The route is sticky while active, but may re-resolve after five idle minutes or a routing error.
If the requested tier is entirely unavailable, OpenRouter may use a neighboring tier.

evidence.title: Coding benchmark percentile
evidence.role: quality tier source used by OpenRouter
